classification.reasoning: The patch involves removing the STRICTNULL feature flag from multiple array scalar functions and refactoring their implementation from using UnaryScalar to a new Scalar subclass with overridden evaluate methods. This is a structural change affecting method implementations and class usage patterns, not just simple string replacements or formatting changes. The localization evidence shows the hunks were found with varying confidence using fuzzy, javaparser, and embedding methods, indicating some structural differences in the target branch. The changes are consistent across multiple related classes, indicating a moderate complexity refactor but not a deep API redesign or complete rewrite. Hence, the patch is classified as TYPE_III with high confidence and a moderate token budget estimate to handle the structural backporting work.

test_state_transition.reason: Valid: Observed fail-to-pass and/or newly passing tests with no regressions.

failed_hunks.old_content:
Signature.builder(NAME, FunctionType.SCALAR)
                .argumentTypes(new ArrayType<>(DataTypes.NUMERIC).getTypeSignature())
                .returnType(DataTypes.NUMERIC.getTypeSignature())
                .features(Scalar.Feature.DETERMINISTIC, Scalar.Feature.STRICTNULL)
                .build(),
            (signature, boundSignature) -> new UnaryScalar<>(
                signature,
                boundSignature,
                new ArrayType<>(DataTypes.NUMERIC),
                ArrayAvgFunction::avgBigDecimal
            )
        );

        builder.add(
            Signature.builder(NAME, FunctionType.SCALAR)
                .argumentTypes(new ArrayType<>(DataTypes.FLOAT).getTypeSignature())
                .returnType(DataTypes.FLOAT.getTypeSignature())
                .features(Scalar.Feature.DETERMINISTIC, Scalar.Feature.STRICTNULL)
                .build(),
            (signature, boundSignature) -> new UnaryScalar<>(
                signature,
                boundSignature,
                new ArrayType<>(DataTypes.FLOAT),
                ArrayAvgFunction::avgFloat
            )
        );

        builder.add(
            Signature.builder(NAME, FunctionType.SCALAR)
                .argumentTypes(new ArrayType<>(DataTypes.DOUBLE).getTypeSignature())
                .returnType(DataTypes.DOUBLE.getTypeSignature())
                .features(Scalar.Feature.DETERMINISTIC, Scalar.Feature.STRICTNULL)
                .build(),
            (signature, boundSignature) -> new UnaryScalar<>(
                signature,
                boundSignature,
                new ArrayType<>(DataTypes.DOUBLE),
                ArrayAvgFunction::avgDouble
            )
        );
